html:
“It teaches you how to build a specific thing.”

-

A Blueprint is an Item that lets the player learn a craftable recipe without having to prototype it first. When used, it restores 15 . Blueprints themselves do not actually create an item; they only allow the player to craft the item away from the station normally used to prototype it. Blueprints for recipes that are already unlocked will no longer be able to be learned again.

Blueprints can be found in Tumbleweeds and some Set Pieces. At first, only Blueprints for unlearned recipes can be found. After all recipes have been learned, Blueprints can still be found, but they may unlock recipes that are already known.

Rare Blueprint

Exclusive to:

In A New Reign, Rare Blueprints were introduced for crafting recipes which cannot be learned any other way. Many of these Blueprints drop from Boss Monsters, providing incentive for players to fight them. Generally, the recipe from the Blueprint will use the unique drop from the boss.

Other sources of rare Blueprints are the Stagehand (provides Blueprint for End Table), Crumpled Packages (provide Blueprints for Desert Goggles), the Ancient Chest, Distilled Knowledge, and the Loot Stash (can provide some rare Blueprint).

Below is table listing all rare Blueprint items. Unless stated otherwise, if it is a mob, it must be killed to obtain the Blueprint.

Multiple Blueprints

Multiple Blueprints are a bunch of Blueprints. They are not present in the game as an item. When crafting them, the player immediately receives several Blueprints. There are two types of them in the game so far: Ruins Turf Blueprints and Imitation Ruins Turf Blueprints

Trivia

  • If the player uses the console to make all recipes available, all random Blueprints spawned will be called "MISSING NAME".
  • There are different console commands for each prototypical item in the game. e.g., to spawn a Blueprint for a Spear, the following command should be used: c_spawn("spear_blueprint").
  • As of the March 2022 QoL update, the Feathery Canvas, Winged Sail, and Waterfowl Can no longer require a Blueprint from Malbatross in order to craft them.

Gallery

  • Blueprint as seen in the poster for the The End is Nigh update.
  • Blueprint as seen on the 2018 Valentine Cards.
  • Blueprint found near a Set Piece in Adventure Mode.
  • A dead Toadstool with a rare Blueprint near it.
  • Unused Moon Glass Axe Blueprint
  • Unused Glass Cutter Blueprint

–Wilson

–Wolfgang
“Whoever drew this is probably dead.”
–Wendy
“KNOWLEDGE WAITING TO BE ABSORBED”
–WX-78
“A detailed technical drawing.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not one for book learning.”
–Woodie
“I know all about that. I... just forgot.”
–Maxwell
“Öh, a map! Nö, wait. That's wröng.”
–Wigfrid
“"Follow the instructions", mum always said.”
–Webber
“Time to stretch the brain muscles.”
–Warly
“Paper for stuff making”
–Wormwood
“Blueprint paper just smells right.”
–Winona
“What knowledge will I find within?”
–Wortox
“Has pictures on it!”
–Wurt
“I'm great at following directions!”
–Walter
“This looks interesting.”
–Wanda
“It teaches you how to build a specific thing.”

Exclusive to:
“It's REALLY scientific!”
–Wilson, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Woah. It doesn't burn!!”
–Willow, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Very, very fancy pictures!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“I'm surprised we didn't die trying to get this.”
–Wendy, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“DRIPPING WITH DELICIOUS KNOWLEDGE”
–WX-78, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Such a rare and detailed drawing!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Looks real complicated, that one.”
–Woodie, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“A rare blueprint, indeed.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Tis a blessed scröll.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“This one feels special.”
–Webber, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“This one looks complicated.”
–Warly, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Ohhhh... Looks important”
–Wormwood, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Progress on paper!”
–Winona, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Ooo, secret knowledge, what fun, what power!”
–Wortox, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Look really complicated, florp.”
–Wurt, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“I think I found something interesting!”
–Walter, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
“Oooh, this looks very interesting!”
–Wanda, when examining a Rare Blueprint.
